content.thinking:
The auto-compact check found some sessions with elevated context usage. Exit code 1 means compaction is recommended for at least one session. The output was truncated, but I can see several sessions showing context percentages ranging from 0.5% to 41.9%.

The session `agent:main:telegram:direct:robberzaz` stands out at 41.9% context usage. Most others are below 15%, but there are a few in the 7-10% range.

This is a cron job that automatically runs. Based on the script behavior, I should probably just report the findings since this is an automated check. Let me provide a summary of what was found.
